title: 以下、スタックしている？ › 完遂せよ。マルチエージェントがマストの/kernel で進めて • Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: requirements packet -> simulation gate -> hands-off execution. Active models: gpt-5, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3- codex, GLM general-reviewer, Copilot Lane manifest: - Main lane: 統合と実装 - 残る...
summary_text: **Lane B Verdict** `Ops Watchdog` failure (`run 23298769769`) is consistent with key drift: workflow sends `WORKERS_API_KEY`, `/health?detailed=true` returned `401`. Evidence is in [ops-watchdog.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/.github/workflows/ops-watchdog.yml#L20), and the run log showed `curl ... /health?detailed=true` then `curl: (22) ... 401`. **Option Comparison** - Change GitHub secret (`WORKERS_API_KEY`) only: - Fastest recovery if you set it to the canonical `WORKERS_API_KEY` that Worker currently accepts. - Risk: this secret is reused by receipt repair/verify workflows with mutation paths, so repointing it to a monitoring-only/admin-only value can break those jobs or change privilege unexpectedly. See [verify-receipt-evidence.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/.github/workflows/verify-receipt-evidence.yml#L37). - Risk: if Worker-side secret is not synchronized, `401` persists (GitHub secret and Worker secret must match). - Change workflow to use another secret: - Safest design is dedicated `MONITORING_API_KEY` for watchdog, aligned with monitoring docs and least-privilege intent. See [MONITORING_AUTH.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/docs/MONITORING_AUTH.md#L11). - Requires controlled rollout: define GitHub `MONITORING_API_KEY`, ensure Worker has `MONITORING_API_KEY`, and stop coupling watchdog health to `WORKERS_API_KEY`. - Using `ADMIN_API_KEY` for watchdog works but is higher privilege than needed. - Important nuance: current auth still accepts legacy `WORKERS_API_KEY` as super-key across scopes. See [api-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/src/utils/api-auth.ts#L66). **Security/Regression Risks** - `WORKERS_API_KEY` is effectively a broad legacy key; exposing it to scheduled GHA jobs increases blast radius if leaked. - Silent drift risk is high because sync paths are manual/dispatch-driven; current secret sync workflow manages `WORKERS_API_KEY` and `QUEUE_API_KEY`, not monitoring key parity. See [sync-secrets.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/.github/workflows/sync-secrets.yml#L36). - Workflow-level secret repurposing can regress unrelated jobs immediately (`verify-receipt-evidence`, scheduled repair flows). **Safest Path Recommendation** 1. Immediate recovery: align GitHub `WORKERS_API_KEY` with Worker’s canonical `WORKERS_API_KEY` and confirm watchdog green. 2. Hardening next: migrate watchdog to dedicated `MONITORING_API_KEY` (keep `WORKERS_API_KEY` for legacy flows until those are migrated). 3. Add drift guard: automated check that GHA secret source and Worker monitoring/super keys are intentionally aligned before scheduled runs.
